purpose: Reproduce the LangHistory ADE@6s headline result deterministically by finding a fixed seed.

baseline_target_from_technical_note.source: Technical Note Language History / LangHistory with-language, no-agents test

delta_vs_technical_note.interpretation: deterministic run beats the technical-note headline by 4.1 cm

determinism_verification.notes: Both runs done with torch.use_deterministic_algorithms(True) + CUBLAS_WORKSPACE_CONFIG=:4096:8. Identical to 15 decimal places.
